_note: Per-voxel steady-state concentration fields for the polarized hepatocyte. Deterministic mean-field steady state of the RDME diffusion (same lattice/geometry/coefficients): D*laplacian(C) - k*C + S = 0 solved by relaxation. glucose = sinusoid->canaliculus gradient (basolateral source 5 mM + cytosolic consumption); atp = peri-mitochondrial micro-domains. Concentrations in mM. Diffusion coefficients and consumption rates are effective crowded-cytosol, order-of-magnitude; the glucose scale is pinned to physiological blood glucose. Positions are normalised cell coordinates in [-1,1].

glucose.quality: order-of-magnitude (D,k); scale pinned to blood glucose
